name: control_light
description: Control one or more smart lights. Can set power (on/off), brightness (0-100), and color (hex #rrggbb). Specify device_ids as a list. Use ["all"] to target all devices. Available device IDs: hexa, tvb, rope, ylight. All fields except device_ids are optional — only include what needs to change.

device_ids.description: List of device IDs to control. Use ["all"] for all devices.

name: query_lights
description: Query the current status of smart lights. Returns power state, brightness, color, and online status. Specify device_ids as a list. Use ["all"] to query all devices. Available device IDs: hexa, tvb, rope, ylight.

device_ids.description: List of device IDs to query. Use ["all"] for all devices.

name: apply_theme
description: Apply a lighting theme preset. Each theme configures all 4 lights with specific colors and brightness. Available themes: christmas, halloween, starry, bonfire, aurora, sunset.

theme_id.description: Theme ID: christmas, halloween, starry, bonfire, aurora, sunset
